releaseNotes: Several improvements: Activity Today tile shows scans, manual entries, decrements and pulls separately. Pull-mode now bulk-decrements bulk-stock instead of always pulling the whole row. FDA dose lookup auto-fills dose more reliably. New phone install with CSV export workflow (multi-device sync is being rebuilt and will return in a later update). Internal reliability fixes: paused sync no longer re-flushes on resume, replay diagnostics filter out local op IDs, manual entries are counted separately from scans on the Today tile.
